analysis.reasoning: Core message: A generic reflection (attributed to the European External Action Service) that major crises, like COVID-19, accelerate existing trends; it states the post-Coronavirus world is already here. There is no explicit claim about the EU’s success, unity, usefulness, leadership, values, or global contributions. Evaluation by narrative: EU1 (successful story) – not promoted; no mention of EU achievements or overcoming obstacles. EU2 (unity) – not promoted; no reference to solidarity or agreements among member states. EU3 (useful for citizens) – not promoted; no policies, measures, or benefits cited. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – not promoted; no claim of EU pioneering regulation or leading on challenges. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not promoted; no human rights or democracy framing. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – not promoted; no mention of EU actions abroad or global cooperation. Conclusion: The tweet is a general observation about crises and trends without advancing any listed EU narrative.
